holdings.infoBox: DBEM is an equity ETF with a total of 1201 individual holdings. The top holdings are Currency Contract - Usd stock at 97.77%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 13.88%, Samsung Electronics at 7.67%, SK hynix at 6.03%, and Tencent Holdings at 2.82%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers MSCI Emerging Markets Hedged Equity ETF (DBEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of emerging firms hedged for currency exposure. DBEM was launched on Jun 9, 2011 and is issued by Xtrackers.
